title: HG dishwasher cleaner and odour freshener 0.5kg
features: HG Dishwasher Cleaner And Odour Freshener: Cleans & de-odourises dishwashing machines, tackling & removing removing grease, food deposits & bad smells from the source

Effective dishwasher cleaner for a fresh smelling appliance: Gives a hygienic clean to drains, filters and rubber seals, meaning your dishwasher operates more effectively and gives even better results
Effectively neutralises odours & cleanses: Leaves your kitchen appliance looking sparkling clean and smelling refreshed, meaning cleaner cutlery, glasses & pans every day
Easy to use formula: Can be used in either a full or an empty dishwasher – no need to remove the dishes first. Cleans seals too. Enough for approx 12 treatments
HG Dishwasher Cleaner granules: Add 4 caps to the detergent tray. Let the empty dishwasher run through a normal cycle (approx. 50°C). Repeat the treatment every 2 weeks
description: Product Description HG Dishwasher Cleaner And Odour Freshener (500g) is a highly effective dishwasher cleaner and de-odouriser to keep your kitchen appliance thoroughly clean inside, and smelling fresh, for every day use. A dishwasher can begin to smell due to grease, food and soap deposits building up in the drains, on the filters, around the inside edges and on the rubber seals. HG’s special cleaner for smelly dishwashers provides a wonderfully smelling dishwasher, meaning cleaner crockery, glasses and cutlery after every wash. Best of all, the easy to use granules can be used in a full or an empty dishwasher, so there’s no need to empty it before using this safe formula. This dishwasher cleaner is suitable for regular use and actively targets and removes dirt and deposits from the dishwasher, removing grease, grime and food waste, leaving it smelling refreshed and hygienic. Contains enough for approximately 12 treatments. Discover HG's wide range of specialist cleaning products for your home, office and outside space. Includes: 1 x HG Dishwasher Cleaner And Odour Freshener (500g) How to use HG’s Dishwasher Cleaner And Odour Freshener: 1. Use in an empty dishwasher:  Add 4 caps (40 gram) of dishwasher cleaner to the detergent tray. Let the empty dishwasher run through a normal cycle (approximately 50°C). Repeat the treatment around every 2 weeks.  2. Use in a full dishwasher:  Add 4 caps (40 gram) of powder to the detergent tray and put the detergent tablet in the cutlery tray or basket. Then let the dishwasher complete a normal programme (approximately 50°C). Repeat the treatment around once a week. Always read the label before use. Keep out of reach of children. Directions Place the cleaner in the dishwasher, run a cycle with a full or empty dishwasher for a clean and fresh dishwasher, repeat up to approximately 12 times for thorough cleaning.
